name: view scope games played cross season week cut
expected_query: with "t52162d1c51812156b7a8eb491b962939" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2023.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2023" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_18') and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('POST', 'REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CASE WHEN player.dob IS NULL OR player.dob = '0000-00-00' THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, TO_DATE(player.dob, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) + (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, TO_DATE(player.dob, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 12.0) + (EXTRACT(DAY FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, TO_DATE(player.dob, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) / 365.25), 2) END as age_0, t52162d1c51812156b7a8eb491b962939.rate_type_total_count as games_played_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t52162d1c51812156b7a8eb491b962939" on "t52162d1c51812156b7a8eb491b962939"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('RB') group by player.fname, player.lname, player.dob, t52162d1c51812156b7a8eb491b962939.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
